# MailerMine PHP & Laravel SDK v1.0.0

**Release date:** 2026-07-17

The first public release of the official MailerMine PHP & Laravel SDK.

## Highlights

- Send transactional email with attachments, CC/BCC, templates, tags, and metadata
- Manage domains, templates, contacts, lists, segments, tags, imports, and exports
- Create, schedule, send, and measure campaigns
- Read account analytics and message delivery logs
- Manage webhooks with HMAC signature verification (`Webhooks::verify()`)
- First-class Laravel 12/13 integration (auto-discovery, facade, config)
- Works in any PHP 8.3+ project without Laravel

## Requirements

| Runtime | Versions |
| ------- | -------- |
| PHP | 8.3, 8.4 |
| Laravel (optional) | 12.x, 13.x |

## Install

```bash
composer require mailermine/mailermine
```

```dotenv
MAILERMINE_API_KEY=your-api-key
```

```php
use MailerMine\Facades\MailerMine;

MailerMine::emails()->send([
    'from' => 'hello@mailermine.com',
    'to' => 'john@example.com',
    'subject' => 'Hello',
    'html' => '<p>Hello from MailerMine</p>',
]);
```

## Quality

- PHPStan level 8
- Laravel Pint
- PHPUnit feature + unit + Laravel integration tests
- CI matrix: PHP 8.3/8.4 × Laravel 12/13
